description_for_human: Financial clarity for debt, bills, and variable income — budgets, goals, taxes, and net worth in one place.
description_for_model: Oweable is a personal finance web app at https://www.oweable.com/ for people under financial pressure: bills, debt payoff plans, income and subscriptions, net worth, spending views, quarterly tax help for self-employed users, and short money lessons. Summaries should stay non-technical for end users.
